# Nova Architecture Review
_Last updated: 2026-05-27 08:27:11_
**Living Document - Full System Audit**  
*Generated by Nova during Task t11*

---

## Overview
Comprehensive architecture and code review of the entire Nova system, excluding logs, temporary files, admin folders, model binaries, and backups.

### Scope: INCLUDED Directories & Files
- **SELF/** - Core identity documents (core/, reference/)
- **nova_body/** - Main application modules:
  - nova_config/
  - nova_cortex/ (executive faculty, tasking system)
  - nova_memory/ (persistence layer)
  - nova_motor/ (action execution)
  - nova_senses/ (input processing: clock, touch, etc.)
- **general_tools/** - Utility scripts and helper modules
- **Tasking/** - Task board infrastructure
- **memory/** - Working memory files (STATUS.md, JOURNAL.md, COLE.md, reports/, autonomy_state.json)
- Root-level configs: nova_config.json, README.md, NovaStart.cmd, etc.

### Scope: EXCLUDED Directories & Files
- logs/ - Runtime log files
- _admin/ - Administrative utilities
- models/ - Model binary files (Qwen3 weights, etc.)
- __pycache__/ - Python bytecode cache
- .nova_app_profile_*/ - Application profile temp data
- prompt_cache/ - Inference caching layer
- nova_memory_db/, nova_lancedb/ - Database backends (treated as persistent storage)

---

## System Structure Map
```
Workspace Root/
├── SELF/core/          → Identity & operating rules
│   ├── 01_identity.md    
│   ├── 02_how_i_work.md  
│   └── ... (loaded in order)
├── nova_body/          → Core application modules
│   ├── nova_config/
│   ├── nova_cortex/     → Executive faculty, tasking system
│   ├── nova_memory/     → Persistence & journal subsystems
│   ├── nova_motor/      → Tool execution layer  
│   └── nova_senses/     → Clock/touch/context awareness
├── general_tools/      → Shared utilities (nova_chat UI, build scripts)
├── Tasking/            → Board infrastructure (tasks.json)
├── memory/             → Working state & reports
└── Root configs        → nova_config.json, startup scripts
```
